render_evidence.basis: hand-stamp: live tier1-smoke render + non-blank pixel-floor probe + human review (coverage-envelope extension from 4 to up to 7 families); no numeric structural-parity score was measured
render_evidence.lane: tier1-smoke live-verify 2026-07-05 (Tableau Desktop pid 36540, open 'Super Bowl by the Numbers' datasource; no-LLM binder: O/U Line(avg)->cols, Super Bowl->rows, Teams/Conference->detail)
render_evidence.critical_pass: not measured (blank-floor probe only, not a structural-parity pass-list)
render_evidence.high_pass: not measured (blank-floor probe only, not a structural-parity pass-list)
render_evidence.pixel_oracle: none (blank-floor probe only: rendered + NON-BLANK, inkRatio 1.29% — a confident non-blank for thin strip ticks, not a golden pixel oracle)

description: A strip/bar-code plot: one tick per detail-grain member along an aggregated measure axis, grouped by a category on rows.

slots.notes: template aggregates Sales with Avg (not Sum): [avg:Sales:qk].
detail/grain dimension carrying semantic-role='[Country].[ISO3166_2]'; the geo semantic-role is a cosmetic hint carried onto the target.
detail/grain dimension carrying semantic-role='[State].[Name]'; cosmetic hint carried onto the target.

hazards.detail: [Country/Region] and [State/Province] carry semantic-role attributes; these are not rewritten by replaceFieldReferences and are carried onto the target fields. They define mark grain, not a geographic map. Verification report agrees the readiness is GREEN (contrast spatial-filled-map which stays YELLOW).
